title: Samba
intro:

Sambucus is a flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae, commonly known as elder or elderberry. The health benefits of Sambucus include its use as an antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, which can help alleviate symptoms of cold and flu, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Sambucus include flavonoids, anthocyanins, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Sambucus include teas, tinctures, and supplements, as well as elderberry syrup and jams, which are used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues.
